summary: Iteration 2 (4 active teams, 20 agents) fully verified. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests pass (teams shape, 20-agent count, cross-team routing deploy→DevOps/Engineering, close-deal→Negotiator/Sales, PRD→Product, tweet→Marketing, team_name present, explicit agent_id for 5 agents across teams, 404 on invalid agent, 400 on empty/whitespace). Frontend: all 6 quick-task chips work end-to-end, free-text 'review the deployment pipeline' routes to DevOps (Engineering), SVG connection line draws only to active agent and disappears on idle, terminal log shows 'Routing to → <Agent> (<Team>)' with team_name. Header correctly shows '4 TEAMS · 20 AGENTS'. 4 team-section-<id> rendered with 5 agents each.

issues: Dialog shows agent_name + directive + output + request_id + timestamp, but the team_name (already available on the output object) is NOT rendered. Minor UX miss given the new multi-team scope — consider adding a small team badge (e.g. 'Engineering · DevOps Agent') in the header of OutputDialog.jsx for clarity.

The floating CommandBar chip tray slightly overlaps the bottom-most team section (Product) at 1920x1080. Canvas bottom padding pb-[22rem] works at 4000px tall viewport but feels tight at 1080. Consider conditional pb or making command bar smaller on shorter viewports.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Render team_name (and maybe team color) in OutputDialog header for better multi-team context.
OPTIONAL: add data-testid on each SVG <path> for deterministic connection-line assertions (currently count-based check used).
OPTIONAL: tighten bottom spacing / z-index so CommandBar doesn't overlap the last team row at 1080p.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is still a single 376-line file; fine for Phase 1 but if more teams/agents or real LLM calls are added, split TEAMS + DUMMY_OUTPUTS into /app/backend/data/teams.py and executor into /app/backend/services/executor.py.
route_task_to_agent is O(teams*agents) keyword scan — fine for 20 agents but note ties are resolved by first-iterated agent; Phase 1 acceptable as stated.
execute_task_dummy correctly marked as LLM-swap point.
Mongo client is instantiated at import time but never used in Phase 1 — keep if intentional for near-term persistence, else defer connection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers 4-team structure (3 TestTeams tests), cross-team routing (6 TestOrchestrateRouting tests), and explicit agent_id across all teams + 400/404 edge cases (8 TestOrchestrateExplicitAgent tests incl. parametrize). Run with: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend data-testids: dashboard-root, app-header, ceo-node, team-section-{marketing|engineering|sales|product}, agent-card-<agent_id>, quick-task-<agent_id> (social_publisher, frontend_engineer, lead_researcher, pm_agent, seo_specialist, negotiator_agent), command-input, command-submit, output-dialog, output-close, connection-lines, terminal-aside. Mocked APIs: execute_task_dummy in server.py is hardcoded per-agent output table — intentional LLM-swap stub.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Iteration-2 scope (3 new teams, 15 new agents, cross-team routing, team_name in response, connection-line active-only) is fully implemented and working end-to-end.
